THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CANO, CARLOS GUSTAVO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
